about.heading: ABOUT US
about.lead: We make pieces with a point of view. Short drops, sharp statements and clean cuts that do not need explaining.
about.note: CLTH.PL is not trying to be for everyone. Every piece should feel direct, wearable and built for everyday rotation.
about.pointOneText: Fewer products, more attention on each drop.
about.pointTwoText: Words that feel like a message, not an ad.
about.pointThreeText: Minimal form, strong print, no unnecessary noise.
